final_prompt.prompt:
Create a still-life photograph of a rustic ceramic vase with dried branches.

Style/medium: needs a "侘寂" aesthetic — references in the spirit of wabi-sabi philosophy (imperfection as beauty), 16th-century Japanese tea-ceremony aesthetics, contemporary Japanese interior photography by Takashi Sugimoto; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a rough ceramic vase with dried branches (one vase, branches inside)
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered wooden table with visible grain and patina, natural window light entering diagonally
Lighting/mood: needs a soft natural light atmosphere from diagonal window — exact light quality and shadow depth is yours
Color palette: needs an earthy, muted direction — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs emphasis on imperfection and traces of time — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
